title: Grand Theft Auto V
short_description: The sprawling open-world crime epic set in the fictional city of Los Santos.
description: Grand Theft Auto V is an open-world action-adventure game set in the sprawling city of Los Santos and its surrounding areas. Players follow the intertwined stories of three protagonists — Michael, Trevor, and Franklin — as they navigate a world of crime, heists, and personal drama. The game also features Grand Theft Auto Online, a continuously evolving online multiplayer mode. GTA V became one of the best-selling entertainment products of all time, surpassing 200 million copies sold worldwide.

awards.name: Game Developers Choice Game of the Year
